title: Cuneiform Tablet #0230: Neo-Assyrian School Tablet
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Neo-Assyrian period — a school tablet document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Neo-Assyrian period. School Tablet document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records school tablet matters typical of Neo-Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
